Intraday post (10/June)

Here is the weekly/monthly postAnd here is my very recent educational post about trading. Part 2 is coming soon…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

The net speed profile is negative, with daily centroid at 6264.65, this is a significant pivot especially after midday, but mechanically must be proved through 6265.5, in terms of gamma effect. Customers are long risk reversal, bought a call spread at 6265/6275 and sold a put spread at 6220/6210 (higher quantity). Betting on supportive environment. This can create a ranging during the PM.

Upside pivot is 6279.50; above this zone we can see a gamma squeeze up to 6300, but the pivot is a strong support/resistance into the afternoon, especially after 2.10PM.Downside pivot is 6249.27, creating an opportunity to test 6220/15 zone, but vol should catch up in order to retest 6209. The pivot is strong after 2.25PMIf the spot is below 6235/30 in the last 1.5 - 2 hours, 6220 can pin. If it is above 6265 (same time interval, strong pivot), then 6275 is a big magnetic lvl.

The spot has a chance to break out of the range to the downside in the first 1 - 1.5 hours, marking 6185 as primal downside target, and 6162 as secondary. Less likely scenario now.To the upside, I code 6300 as max.
